message:
Add smooth CSS transitions when switching themes

Implement a graceful theme transition system that provides visual
continuity when users toggle between light and dark modes:

- Add .theme-transitioning CSS class in globals.css that applies
  smooth transitions to background-color, border-color, color,
  fill, stroke, and box-shadow properties (0.2-0.25s ease-out)

- Update ThemeProvider to temporarily add the transitioning class
  when the theme changes, then remove it after 300ms to avoid
  interfering with normal UI interactions

- Use !important on transition properties to ensure they override
  component-specific transitions during the theme switch

This prevents the jarring flash that occurs when all colors change
simultaneously, creating a more polished user experience similar
to what users expect from apps like Linear and Notion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
